meta.title: Play Now | PADEL2GO – Book Your Court
meta.description: Get started with PADEL2GO! Download the app or book your next padel court directly online.

hero.subtitle: With PADEL2GO you book in seconds, earn points and join the biggest padel community.
hero.accountNote: An account is required to book.

features: Book courts in real time at every PADEL2GO location
Track your matches and climb the P2G League
Find playing partners and join the community

web.title: Prefer to book straight from your browser?
web.description: No problem! You can also reserve your court without the app via our web booking. Just create an account and off you go.

toast.comingSoonDescription: The app will be available soon.
